'''Enarc''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. It was a frigid ball of rock.<ref name="S" /> It was [[Demophon supernova|destroyed]] when the star [[Demophon]] exploded as a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="BE">{{WEGCite|story=The Beginning of the End|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
